mapper.sql: contract_id, project_id, project_name, contract_no, contract_name, contract_type, invest_amount, share_ratio, investor, funder, sign_date, effective_date, expire_date, contract_status, process_instance_id, file_path, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM invest_contract WHERE contract_id = #{contractId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.update:
UPDATE invest_contract
project_id = #{projectId}, contract_no = #{contractNo}, contract_name = #{contractName}, contract_type = #{contractType}, invest_amount = #{investAmount}, share_ratio = #{shareRatio}, contract_status = #{contractStatus}, file_path = #{filePath}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime},
WHERE contract_id = #{contractId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete:
UPDATE invest_contract SET del_flag = '2' WHERE contract_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM invest_contract WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY create_time DESC
